minimum_roles_responsibilities.description: Owns the product, pricing, deployment model, and operating rules. Manages customer relationships and business strategy.
Builds and maintains the device, firmware, connectivity, and backend. Ensures smooth operation of IoT systems.
Handles assembly, inventory, provisioning, and hardware issue follow-up. Coordinates with technical team for repairs and replacements.

operational_needs.description: Set up new customers with devices and provide initial training.
Respond to customer inquiries, device failures, and other issues. Provide timely resolution or escalation as needed.
Ensure devices are available for pickup at lockers and ready for deployment.
Work with local transport companies to ensure timely delivery of devices and pick-up of perishable goods.

physical_presence_needs.description: Operate in coastal Tunisian cities with physical lockers for device pick-up and drop-off. May require local staff to manage lockers and customer interactions.

tools_stack.description: Registers devices and tracks status, health, and connectivity.
Receives device data and supports device communication.
Tracks units, parts, and device assignment.
Receives and tracks device failures and customer issues.
